component.name: nuxeo.quota.webui.automation.bindings
component.documentation:
Restricts the platform Quotas.SetMaxSize operation to administrators.
Note: this binding controls the REST endpoint for the platform-provided Quotas.SetMaxSize operation (whose source we cannot modify). All quota operations defined by this plugin enforce authorization in Java via nuxeo.quota.webui.QuotaUtils.ensureAdmin(), which honors the nuxeo.quota.webui.admin.groups and nuxeo.quota.webui.admin.users nuxeo.conf properties.
To allow additional groups to set container quotas via Quotas.SetMaxSize, override this binding in your own contribution by requiring this component:
<require>nuxeo.quota.webui.automation.bindings</require> <extension target="org.nuxeo.ecm.automation.server.AutomationServer" point="bindings"> <binding name="Quotas.SetMaxSize"> <administrator>true</administrator> <groups>myCustomGroup,anotherGroup</groups> </binding> </extension>
See https://doc.nuxeo.com/nxdoc/filtering-exposed-operations/
